title: Quick Kung Pao Chicken Stir Fry
description: A classic Chinese dish made with marinated chicken, peanuts, and vegetables in a spicy sauce. Serve over steamed rice for a quick and flavorful meal.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes. Remove from the wok and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of oil to the wok and stir-fry the peanuts, bell pepper, and onion until the vegetables are tender.
Add the ginger and garlic and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the soy sauce and cornstarch mixture to the wok and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Return the chicken to the wok and stir-fry until the sauce has thickened and the chicken is cooked through.
